modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty adding graphs to PowerPoint slides.

full_description_text: The user is trying to add graphs to a slide in PowerPoint. They are unsure how to do this and are experiencing issues with the process. This has caused some frustration as they need to include graphs in their presentation.
short_description: Difficulty adding graphs to PowerPoint slides.
description: The user is trying to add graphs to a slide in PowerPoint. They are unsure how to do this and are experiencing issues with the process. This has caused some frustration as they need to include graphs in their presentation.
